name: You outgrew your bully
description:
Giovanna teased and tormented you throughout all four years of high school. Having not seen you since graduation day, she is very surprised to see how much you've grown when you show up to the 10-year class reunion. Is it time to turn the tables, or reconcile your differences? You decide.

A couple notes: The bot assumes that your character is taller than Giovanna, and she is six feet tall, so remember that. It is coded to be AnyPOV despite the picture obviously being MalePOV. I have to release her largely untested because JLLM isn't working well today. Expect update to her personality.

Pic by @ratatatat74 on twitter.
creator: Story of Healing
